cards.title: LSP D-Planner+
cards.description: Unified open-circuit and rebreather decompression planner — Bühlmann ZHL-16C + GF, VPM-B, CCR, pSCR, bailout, Tier 3 engine, offline PWA and Android.

cards.title: T-Viewer
cards.description: Companion app for LSP D-Planner+. Open, read, and share dive plan TXT and PDF files exported by LSP D-Planner+ on Android or in the browser — syntax highlighting for deco schedules, gas labels, and warnings.

cards.title: Get In Water
cards.description: Pack your dive trip. Customizable master gear template, per-trip checklists, and TXT/PDF export. Install as a PWA or download the Android APK — companion to LSP D-Planner+.

cards.title: Knowledge Base
cards.description: Curated videos, reels, and reading for divers — study skills, signals, and gear know-how before your next dive. All links in one place.

cards.title: 3D Dive Gadgets
cards.description: Custom 3D-printed diving accessories — designed and built for real divers.

featured.title: 360 Diving Mirror
featured.description: Convex wrist mirror for all-round underwater vision — monitor buddies, check valves, signal on the surface.

featured.title: WoW Plates
featured.description: Weight on Webbing plates — quick, secure way to add lead to any 2″ harness webbing without de-kitting.

featured.title: Long Hose Retainer
featured.description: Triglide-based long hose holder that stays put on your harness, with an extra D-ring for fins or gear.
